source_pr.title: executor: create vecgroupcheck package to improve test
source_pr.body:

### What is changed and how it works?

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: - // make a copy to avoid DATA RACE.
